brand_description: Nicobar is a contemporary Indian lifestyle brand known for its clean, modern aesthetic in clothing, home decor, and accessories. It was founded in 2015 by Simran Lal and her mother, and is part of the Good Earth group.
key_products: Apparel, home furnishings, accessories, and lifestyle products
target_customer: Urban, design-conscious individuals seeking modern Indian aesthetics
technology_stack: UNKNOWN (but JD mentions Microsoft BI, LLM APIs, Python/NodeJS, SQL)
culture: Design-driven, brand-focused, aiming to be AI-native in operations
